arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim handed Leny Yoro reality check after Man Utd star's struggles
arts.sum: Leny Yoro was given only his third Manchester United start by Ruben Amorim but was given the run-around by Southampton on a chastening evening before his side ran out 3-1 winners

arts.ttl: From Norway: Latest on Manchester United and Sverre Nypan – Looks like Red Devils have decided to move on
arts.sum: Sverre Nypan has been linked with Manchester United at various points for the past year, with some of the claims, and some of the reaction to those, getting more than a little carried away. In September, it was reported the Premier League club had sent a scout to watch the then-17-year-old in action for Rosenborg The post From Norway: Latest on Manchester United and Sverre Nypan – Looks like Red Devils have decided to move on appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford only wants to leave Man Utd for ONE club
arts.sum: According to SPORT, Rashford has hesitated on a move to Milan as he is waiting for Barca to formalise their interest, with the Catalan side aiming to resolve their financial issues before making a move for the United man. With Milan, West Ham and Como also linked in recent weeks, Rashford will likely have a wide range of teams to pick from if a financial compromise can be reached, however the England star is understood to be holding out for a move to Barcelona .

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Marcus Rashford exit possibility revealed as European elite linked
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is reportedly subject to intensifying interest from European giants, with Manchester United keen to move the Englishman on this January.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer to join Jose Mourinho for first job since Man Utd sacking
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker and manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer is set to make his return to coaching with Turkish side Besiktas to join Jose Mourinho in the Super Lig

arts.ttl: Southampton were like innocent kids - Juric
arts.sum: Southampton manager Ivan Juric says his side were like "innocent kids" after conceding three late goals against Manchester United at Old Trafford.
